description: Grounded Docs MCP Server: Open-Source Alternative to Context7, Nia, and Ref.Tools

findings.title: Supply Chain CVE: GHSA-43fc-jf86-j433 in axios@1.13.2
findings.recommendation: Upgrade axios to a version that resolves GHSA-43fc-jf86-j433. Check https://osv.dev/vulnerability/GHSA-43fc-jf86-j433 for patched versions. Enable Dependabot or OSV-Scanner in CI to catch future CVEs automatically.
